title: Ignore Rules, Attributes, Line Endings, and Repository Content · History Brief: Secret Large Generated Data
summary: Keep generated output, local configuration, binaries, and secrets out of history while preserving cross-platform text behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the git secret large generated data increment in a content-boundary and normalization policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent and respond to secrets, large binaries, generated artifacts, and sensitive history with policy and rotation boundaries.
Control repository and working-tree line endings while separating attributes from core.autocrlf and reviewing renormalization.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
